login.title: J1.Notes
login.resetHint: To reset your access, open the app settings and disable the app lock, or contact your administrator.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.prompt: Enter your recovery email to receive a reset link.
forgot.checkEmail: If this email is registered for password recovery, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.requirements: At least 8 characters, with letters and numbers.
reset.expiredOrInvalid: This reset link has expired or is invalid.
reset.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
reset.complexity: Password must contain letters and numbers
reset.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
